zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Standish於1256年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親Jordan Standish22歲，母親Alianora23歲。他於1285年與Margaret Euxton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Standish于1256年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲Jordan Standish22岁，母亲Alianora23岁。他于1285年与Margaret Euxton在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Standish was born in 1256, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, Jordan Standish, was 22 and his mother, Alianora, was 23. He married Margaret Euxton in 1285, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1322, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Standish, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Standish est né en 1256, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Jordan Standish, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alianora, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Euxton en 1285, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1322, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Standish 1256 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jordan Standish 22 und seine Mutter Alianora 23. Er hat 1285 in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Euxton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Standish, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Standish è nato il nel 1256 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Jordan Standish, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alianora, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Euxton nel 1285, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1322, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Standish, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Standishが1256年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Jordan Standishは22歳，母Alianoraは23歳であった。1285年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでMargaret Euxtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Standish(이)가 1256년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan Standish(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianora(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Margaret Euxton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Standish nasceu em 1256, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jordan Standish, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alianora, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Euxton em 1285, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1322, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Standish родился в 1256 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Jordan Standish было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alianora, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Euxton в 1285 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1322 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Standish nació en 1256, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Jordan Standish, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alianora, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Euxton en 1285, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1322, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
